title: umbra-py download manifest
description: The JSON array umbra-py prints to stdout when 'umbra download --json' succeeds: one record per downloaded asset, so a caller can verify each file it just fetched without re-hashing it. Stable within a minor version.

asset.description: The product asset that was downloaded (e.g. "GEC", "SICD").

path.description: Filesystem path of the written file.

bytes.description: Size of the written file in bytes.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the written file's contents.
